intro.title: Brief Introduction
intro.text: Emirgan Consultancy Trade Joint Stock Company is a professional firm offering integrated advisory services across a broad range of business activities. Our expert team supports your projects in energy, real estate, trade, construction and investment.

steps.title: Discovery & Needs Assessment
steps.description: We listen to your business objectives and current situation, and clearly define your needs together.

steps.title: Strategy & Roadmap
steps.description: We build a sector-specific strategic plan and an actionable implementation roadmap.

steps.title: Execution & Advisory
steps.description: We execute the agreed actions with our expert team and stand by you throughout the process.

steps.title: Monitoring & Ongoing Support
steps.description: We measure outcomes, monitor progress, and continue our support for sustainable growth.

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Emirgan Consultancy Trade Joint Stock Company
paragraphs: Emirgan Consultancy Trade Joint Stock Company is a professional advisory firm established under the Turkish Commercial Code with broad authority and a wide scope of business activities.

We provide reliable and high-quality services in advisory, business development, legal follow-up, financial planning and investment projects. Leveraging our cross-sector expertise, we deliver integrated solutions in energy, real estate, agriculture, trade, logistics and construction.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To contribute to our clients' sustainable growth and become one of Turkey's preferred advisory firms.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To deliver the most effective and up-to-date solutions to our clients by acting with integrity, confidentiality and professionalism.

team.title: Our Team
team.intro: Behind the success of Emirgan Consultancy Trade Joint Stock Company stands our strong team of experienced and specialized partners.

members.name: Kim Can Yıldız
members.title: Partner - Chairman of the Board
members.description: An experienced business leader and executive. He is responsible for the company's strategic direction and has long-standing expertise in business development and corporate governance.

members.name: Turan Öner
members.title: Partner - Legal Counsel, Mediator and Attorney
members.description: Specialized in commercial law, mediation and contract management, supporting clients in dispute resolution and legal advisory processes.

members.name: Fatih Karaca
members.title: Partner - Legal Counsel and Attorney
members.description: An expert attorney in corporate law, commercial disputes and corporate advisory. A reliable legal solution partner in our clients' legal processes.

members.name: Acar Baran Eyüpoğlu
members.title: Partner - Legal Counsel and Attorney
members.description: A legal expert with extensive experience in commercial contracts, corporate transactions and investment projects.

members.name: Ozan Öndeş
members.title: Partner - Legal Counsel and Attorney
members.description: Specialized in commercial law and corporate advisory, providing practical and solution-oriented legal support to our clients.

items.title: Strategic Management and Business Development Advisory
items.description: We define your company's strategic objectives, develop growth strategies, and optimize your business processes.

items.title: Legal and Contract Advisory
items.description: We provide professional legal support in contract drafting, commercial disputes, corporate governance and legal proceedings.

items.title: Financial Planning and Tax Advisory
items.description: We support budgeting, tax optimization, financial reporting and cash-flow planning.

items.title: Investment and Feasibility Reports
items.description: We prepare comprehensive feasibility reports with economic, technical and legal analyses for your potential investments.

items.title: Real Estate and Project Development Advisory
items.description: We deliver advisory services for real estate acquisition and disposal, leasing, project development and investment processes.

items.title: Trade and Export Advisory
items.description: We support you in export processes, market research, distributorship structuring and international trade operations.

items.title: Corporate Governance and Partnership Processes
items.description: Advisory services for mergers, partnership structures and corporate governance.

kvkk.title: Data Protection Information Notice
kvkk.intro: As Emirgan Consultancy Trade Joint Stock Company, in accordance with Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data ("KVKK") and applicable legislation, we process your personal data obtained through our website in our capacity as data controller within the framework set out below.
